data.title: Metropolitan Water District is starting project to boost water supply for LA and Ventura counties hit by drought.
data.description: Los Angeles, Metropolitan Water District of Southern California will commence the Sepulveda Feeder Pump Stations project to enhance water reliability in areas of Los Angeles and Ventura counties. These regions faced significant water reduction mandates due to the unprecedented drought in 2020-2022. The project involves pushing Colorado River water and stored resources from Diamond Valley Lake, the largest reservoir in Southern California. This initiative aims to bolster water supplies for communities impacted by the recent drought.

data.title: Celebration of 100 years of Illinois Route 66 in McLean County by VisitBN with yearlong centennial-themed events.
data.description: In Bloomington-Normal, Illinois, on January 20, 2026, VisitBN (Bloomington-Normal Area Convention and Visitors Bureau) revealed plans for a year-long tribute to the 100th anniversary of Historic Route 66 in McLean County. Throughout the year, festivities will take place along the iconic route from Chenoa to McLean, featuring special events to commemorate the Mother Road's milestone celebrations.

data.title: Land O'Lakes, Inc. and Imagine Entertainment collaborate to redefine rural America narratives for film and TV creators.
data.description: Collaborating to provide valuable insights and support for film and TV creators, Land O'Lakes, Inc. has teamed up to assist in portraying rural America authentically. The partnership, announced in Arden Hills, Minnesota, and Los Angeles, aims to offer resources for creators looking to depict rural settings accurately. The initiative was launched before the 2026 Sundance Film Festival, emphasizing the importance of authenticity in storytelling. This collaboration signifies a commitment to ensuring accurate representation in media, highlighting the significance of showcasing rural America in a truthful light.

data.title: Three national security professionals have joined Greenberg Traurig amid rising global risks, assisting clients in managing security threats.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, worldwide companies are encountering a period characterized by political turmoil, increasing regional disputes, and growing cyber risks. The necessity of safeguarding their resources and personnel has reached unprecedented levels. Consequently, organizations are seeking guidance to comprehend and address these challenges.

data.title: AIF Fund V invests $150,000-200,000 in Clearcut Surgical, Frönen Foods, and TaxRay, adding to its portfolio.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Fairfield, Connecticut, the Angel Investor Forum (AIF) revealed that AIF Seed Fund V LLC (Fund V) has successfully invested between $150,000 and $200,000 in three startups. The chosen portfolio companies are Clearcut Surgical, Frönen Foods, and TaxRay. Clearcut Surgical, specifically, is one of the recipients and has received funding for its innovative project.

data.title: Co-Founder of Sega, David Rosen, passed away at 95. He turned a photo booth business into a major gaming industry player, creating hits like Mortal Kombat and Sonic the Hedgehog.
data.description: A remarkable entrepreneur transitioned his Japanese photo booth venture into a prominent player in the gaming industry, responsible for developing popular titles such as Mortal Kombat and Sonic the Hedgehog. Through his innovative vision, he expanded his business empire with an impressive array of games that garnered millions of players worldwide. His journey showcases the transformative power of seizing opportunities and diversifying into new markets, leading to a substantial increase in revenue and global influence.
